content.text: Anime game ultimate attack video, 6 seconds. Use the reference image as the exact character identity and costume base. Saber Artoria lifts a holy golden sword, a massive Excalibur beam tears across a dark battlefield, blue armor rim light, gold particles, cinematic camera push-in, dramatic wind, high contrast, clean 2D anime finish. Keep the face and outfit consistent with the reference image. No subtitles, no UI, no watermark.
